goal: 回填 v0.3.0 failover hardening 与 review fixes 提交

summary.title: 回填 v0.3.0 failover hardening 与 review fixes
summary.what: 为一组已推送 v0.3.0 稳定性提交建立 Mainline 覆盖：637eca4 harden router provider failover；873a516 综合 code review 修复；4e9faec 修复 OAuth provider modelOverrides false positive；86ef7ee 更新对应修复说明；bf6e501 补充 v0.3.0 release notes。
summary.why: 这些提交改变了 router failover、配置向导、错误处理、OAuth provider warning 和发布文档，但没有 Mainline 语义记录；需要回填以保存设计意图和后续审查上下文。
summary.user_goal: 回填 v0.3.0 failover hardening 与 review fixes 提交

decisions.point: 如何处理 v0.3.0 review/failover 历史提交
decisions.chose: 把相关功能修复和文档说明合并为一个 backfill intent。
decisions.rationale: 这些提交是同一轮 v0.3.0 稳定性与发布准备工作；单独拆分会增加噪声，合并后仍能清楚记录文件和行为范围。

decisions.point: 版本 bump 提交如何处理
decisions.chose: 不纳入本 backfill，因为 e50af71 已被 Mainline skip pattern 覆盖。
decisions.rationale: 版本号 bump 是 routine release metadata，不需要与行为修复同一个 semantic seal。

decisions.point: 与后续 canonical aliases/protocol 工作的重叠
decisions.rationale: 本组提交先强化 failover、UI 和 warnings；后续 int_3d291a09 在同一核心文件上继续添加 canonical route 能力，不是互斥设计。

review_notes: e50af71 chore version bump 已由 skip pattern 处理。
当前仓库后续验证在 later work line 中通过 npm run build、npm run typecheck、npm test；本 backfill 不新增代码。

architectural_claims: router provider failover path was hardened around stream startup, retries, fallback behavior, and user-visible failure reporting.
config wizard/order behavior was stabilized through review fixes and regression tests.
OAuth providers should not receive false-positive modelOverrides warnings when those warnings do not apply.
behavioral_changes: Provider failover became more robust under upstream stream failures and router errors.
Code review fixes tightened config wizard behavior and router runtime edge cases.
OAuth-provider modelOverrides diagnostics were narrowed to avoid false positives.
v0.3.0 release notes documented the delivered behavior.
security_implications: No credential schema changes; OAuth warning behavior was diagnostic-only.
migration_notes: No user migration required for these fixes.
